title: Smoky Chestnut Delight
description: A simple and flavorful dish made with chestnuts and a smoky twist.
instructions: Rinse chestnuts and pat dry with a paper towel.
In a bowl, mix together chestnuts and smoky.
Drizzle water over the chestnut mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly.
Serve warm, garnished with additional smoky if desired.
